scripts.test: npm run db:ensure && NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL="$(tsx src/db/print-database-url.ts --kind test)" prisma db push --force-reset --skip-generate && NODE_ENV=test DATABASE_URL="$(tsx src/db/print-database-url.ts --kind test)" node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 src/*.test.ts
scripts.db:push: npm run db:ensure && RUST_LOG=${RUST_LOG:-info} DATABASE_URL="$(tsx src/db/print-database-url.ts)" prisma db push
scripts.errors:check: node --import tsx scripts/generate-errors.ts --check --catalog errors.yml --typescript-out src/shared/errors/generated.ts --openapi-out src/shared/errors/openapi.generated.json
